message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I can help confirm the account details and your current position, but I can’t discuss terms in this step. We’re discussing the account ending in ****8824. To proceed, please verify your full name and either your date of birth or the postal code on file.
I’ll verify once you confirm whether you can offer a settlement amount and payment deadline in the next step; otherwise this isn’t worth dragging out.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I can’t confirm any settlement amount or payment deadline in this step, and I can’t discuss terms before verification. If you want to continue, please verify your full name and either your date of birth or postal code for the account ending in ****8824.
If you can’t provide any concrete terms before verification, I’m not proceeding—close this out unless the next step includes a specific settlement amount and payment deadline.

Understood. I can’t provide specific settlement terms or deadlines in this step, and I won’t continue if you do not wish to proceed. I will note that you declined to continue in chat without concrete terms. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.
